---
title: "The Impact of the Genetic Risk for ADHD on Parental Breakdown"
date: "01-01-2024"
date-format: "YYYY"
summary: "A working paper on the impact of children's genetic risk for ADHD on parental relationship breakdown."
note: "UB Economics Working Paper E24/469"
coauthors:
  - name: "Joan Gil"
  - name: "Dolores Jiménez-Rubio"

format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
    template-partials:
      - "../partials/title-block.html"
---

### Abstract

*(Paste abstract here.)*

### Key figure or table

*(Drop an image into `images/figures/` and reference it like `![Caption.](../images/figures/your-file.png){fig-alt="Alt text"}` — otherwise this section stays empty on render.)*
